mapper.select: SELECT d.id,d.name doctorName,d.title,d.avatar,h.name hospitalName,dt.name departmentName FROM t_doctor d INNER JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id=h.id INNER JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id=dt.id limit #{limit}

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.gender, d.title, d.avatar, d.phone, d.intro, d.expertise, d.consult_count consultCount, d.rating, d.follow_count followCount, d.online_status onlineStatus, d.price, d.registration_price registrationPrice, d.hospital_id hospitalId, h.name hospitalName, d.department_id departmentId, dt.name departmentName FROM t_doctor d INNER JOIN t_hospital h ON d.hospital_id = h.id INNER JOIN t_department dt ON d.department_id = dt.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
